response.justification: Strong software engineer but fails two critical mandatory requirements: has only ~2-3 years of dated C++ experience (last 6+ years in TypeScript/Node.js ecosystem), with no Windows platform mentioned, and critically lacks any fixed-income, capital-markets, or banking domain expertise. Career trajectory shows movement away from systems-level C++ work toward modern web and AI infrastructure.
strengths: Demonstrated software craftsmanship fundamentals with strong TDD, CI/CD pipeline, and DevOps expertise
Excellent communication and technical leadership evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and open-source project stewardship
Rapid skill acquisition and versatility across multiple languages and technical domains
concerns: C++ experience is limited (~2-3 years total) and outdated (last work 2014-2018), with significant skill atrophy likely after 6+ years in TypeScript/Node.js
No evidence of Windows platform development, SQL Server or Oracle database experience, or capital-markets/fixed-income domain exposure
Current role at Stripe focuses on full-stack web and AI-agent infrastructure—opposite domain and tech stack from role requirements

key_factors.factor: C++ experience gap (2-3 years vs. required 5-10)
Software engineering fundamentals and communication skills
